---
title: "Polarizing Provisions"
description: |
  Where do you stand?
date: '2026-07-14'
image: "sandwich.jpg"
categories:
    - Food
format: html
toc: true
lightbox: true
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  error: false
  message: false
draft: false
---

```{r}
library(here)
source(here("packages.R"))
source(here("functions.R"))

series_filter = 18

data = pollresults(series_filter)
```

```{r}
for (q in unique(data$question)) {
  print(simple_bar_question(data, q))
}
```
